messages.body:
Hi,

Need to discuss about priorities of current project. Let's meet in evening.
Any time slot from 7PM 1ST to 11PM 1ST works for me.

Thanks

Hi P,

I can discuss project priorities today.
Let's meet at 7 PM IST.

Best,
pragya
